meaning: n.淡水藻类的一种,项圈藻
examples: It can effectively remove Anabaena by coagulation, cell lysis and biodegradation.
The toxicity effect of 6 carbamic ester pesticides on Anabaena flos-aquae was studied.
The algae responsible for the problems in Wales, Anabaena spirioides, has a 50% chance of being toxic.
